name: skcapstone-source
description: SKCapstone sovereign agent framework source code. Contains the core Python packages (skcapstone CLI, coordination, memory, sync, security, identity), MCP tools, OpenClaw plugin, tests, and documentation.

sourceDirectories.description: Core framework — models, CLI, coordination, memory, sync, security modules
Pytest test suite mirroring src structure
OpenClaw plugin that registers agent tools wrapping the skcapstone CLI
Installation, dev setup, and utility scripts
Architecture docs, security design, sovereign singularity spec

conventions.python: 3.11+, PEP 8, type hints, black formatting, pydantic models, Google-style docstrings
conventions.testing: pytest, minimum 3 tests per feature (happy path, edge case, failure)
conventions.venv: ~/.skenv/ (dedicated virtualenv, do NOT use system pip)
